scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.db:migrate: docker compose exec -T db psql -U postgres -d lunch_roulette -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/migrations/001_init.sql
scripts.db:seed: docker compose exec -T db psql -U postgres -d lunch_roulette -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/seed.sql
